user.title: Ring Snapshot
user.description: Set up the Ring Snapshot service.

init.title: Ring Snapshot
init.description: Choose the default camera used by the snapshot service.

take_snapshot.name: Take snapshot
take_snapshot.description: Takes one JPEG snapshot from an existing camera entity through Home Assistant's internal WebRTC camera API.

camera_entity.name: Camera entity
camera_entity.description: The existing camera entity to use.

filename.name: Filename
filename.description: Absolute path where the JPEG snapshot will be saved.

filename_not_absolute.message: Filename must be an absolute path: {filename}

filename_not_allowed.message: Cannot write {filename}; add the directory to allowlist_external_dirs.

entity_not_registered.message: {entity_id} is not in the entity registry.

entity_not_loaded.message: {entity_id} is registered but not currently loaded.

snapshot_timeout.message: Timed out waiting for a video frame from {entity_id}.

camera_entity_required.message: Select a camera in the Ring Snapshot integration settings or provide camera_entity in the service call.
